message:
fix(test): correct INSTRUCT tokenization in Paris test

- Fixed token 733 (" [") to 28792 ("[") after BOS token
- The original tokenization had a space before [INST] which is incorrect
- Added documentation noting that instruct models prefer complete
  sentence responses ("The capital of France is Paris.") over direct
  answers ("Paris"), which is expected behavior
- Paris being #4 instead of #1 is characteristic of instruction-tuned
  models, not a bug in the implementation
